summary: Tested batch-by-orders endpoint for ClientsTab document links feature. All 11 backend tests passed. The endpoint correctly returns documents grouped by order_id with Ukrainian labels, skips duplicates, and provides accessible preview URLs.
critical_code_review_comments: ClientsTab.jsx line 478: Correctly calls POST /api/documents/batch-by-orders after loading client orders
ClientsTab.jsx line 1121: Correctly filters out invoice_offer from generated docs (it has static link)
ClientsTab.jsx line 1140: Uses BACKEND_URL + doc.preview_url for full URL
ClientsTab.jsx line 1142: Opens in new tab with target='_blank'
documents.py line 284-345: batch-by-orders endpoint correctly groups by order_id, skips duplicates, returns Ukrainian labels
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data: Order 7293 (4 docs), Order 7425 (defect_act)
context_for_next_testing_agent: batch-by-orders endpoint working correctly. Test orders: 7293 has deposit_refund_act, invoice_additional, deposit_settlement_act, invoice_offer. Order 7425 has defect_act. Frontend code verified to compile and correctly fetch/display documents.
